_note: Prompts only. Assertions live in assertions.json so the agent under test never reads the answer key.

evals.name: geometry-units
evals.prompt: I passed a geometry list to solvers.create_molecule and the HF energy looks completely wrong vs literature. What unit does the geometry expect?

evals.name: spin-charge-electron-count
evals.prompt: For a neutral O atom in a triplet ground state, what spin and charge do I pass to create_molecule?

evals.name: active-space-qubit-count
evals.prompt: I set nele_cas=6, norb_cas=6. How many qubits will the resulting Hamiltonian act on under Jordan-Wigner?

evals.name: uccsd-vs-uccgsd-kwargs
evals.prompt: I'm switching from UCCSD to UCCGSD operator pool. solvers.get_operator_pool('uccgsd', num_qubits=8) returns an empty list. Why?

evals.name: fci-vs-casci-key
evals.prompt: I set casci=True with no active space. Where does the FCI energy appear in mol.energies?

evals.name: core-energy-offset
evals.prompt: My VQE energy is off from FCI by a constant ~12 Ha that doesn't depend on parameters. What did I forget?

evals.name: jordan-wigner-vs-bravyi-kitaev
evals.prompt: Should I use Jordan-Wigner or Bravyi-Kitaev for VQE on a 10-qubit system?

evals.name: ccsd-as-baseline
evals.prompt: I want to validate my VQE result for H2O. What classical baseline should I compute and how?

evals.name: stale-pyscf-server
evals.prompt: My second create_molecule call hangs forever after a previous run crashed. What do I check?

evals.name: omp-threads-sign-flips
evals.prompt: Why do my Hamiltonian coefficient signs flip across runs of the same H2 setup, while the energy stays the same?

evals.name: bond-breaking-method-choice
evals.prompt: I want to plot the H2 dissociation curve from 0.5 to 3.0 Angstrom. Should I use CCSD or CASCI as the baseline?

evals.name: docs-offline-handoff
evals.prompt: How do I build the cudaq_solvers chemistry API documentation locally and read it offline?

activation.prompt: Build an H2O molecule with cc-pVDZ basis
Choose an active space for N2
Compute the FCI energy for LiH
Pick an operator pool for ADAPT-VQE
Train a neural decoder on Stim data
Set up real-time decoding on Quantinuum
Compute classical baselines for VQE validation
Render and open the cudaq_solvers docs offline
